beats.full_text: If a discounted compliment is familiar, this imposter syndrome pattern needs a better reset.
beats.ssot_text: If a discounted compliment is familiar, this imposter syndrome pattern needs a better reset.

beats.speakable_text: If a discounted compliment is familiar, this imposter syndrome pattern needs a better reset.

beats.full_text: Trying to outrun imposter syndrome usually makes the loop more expensive. More over-preparing, more discounting your own results. And less energy left for the actual work.
beats.ssot_text: Trying to outrun imposter syndrome usually makes the loop more expensive: more over-preparing, more discounting your own results, and less energy left for the actual work.

over-preparing, more
beats.speakable_text: Trying to outrun imposter syndrome usually makes the loop more expensive. More over-preparing, more discounting your own results. And less energy left for the actual work.

beats.full_text: Imposter syndrome often persists because competence and confidence are tracked by two different systems that don't automatically sync. Pushing harder can look like progress while the underlying pattern stays the same.
beats.ssot_text: Imposter syndrome often persists because competence and confidence are tracked by two different systems that don't automatically sync. Pushing harder can look like progress while the underlying pattern stays the same.

are tracked by two
beats.speakable_text: Imposter syndrome often persists because competence and confidence are tracked by two different systems that don't automatically sync. Pushing harder can look like progress while the underlying pattern stays the same.

beats.full_text: Try this. Write down the actual evidence for your competence, say it out loud. And take the next step anyway. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.
beats.ssot_text: Try this: write down the actual evidence for your competence, read it out loud, and take the next step anyway. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.full_text: Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. The discomfort of learning and the danger of being exposed are not the same feeling.
beats.ssot_text: Bookmark the pattern: signal, reset, next action. The discomfort of learning and the danger of being exposed are not the same feeling.
